name: Presidential Cinnamon-Glazed Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter in a 15x10x1" baking pan and bake at 325°F until melted, about 5-7 minutes.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat egg whites with salt until soft peaks form.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
4. Fold in cinnamon and almonds; pour over butter and toss to coat evenly.
5. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes, turning every 10 minutes, or until almonds are crisp.
Yields: 3 cups
